creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Optimus ON in BIOS:
  http://i.imgur.com/1Xi5Q2L.jpg
  http://i.imgur.com/Ghq5vkK.jpg

With Optimus set to ON FreeBSD fails to start x11/xorg, no matter if
Intel graphics specified in /etc/X11/xorg.conf or Nvidia card.


I attach below information about:
 - hardware
 - pciconf -lv
 - dmesg
 - sysctl -a
 - acpiconf -i 0
 - dmidecode
 - dmidecode --dump
 - usbconfig

===============================================================================



hardware:

Lenovo ThinkPad W530
  cpu: Intel Core i7-3630QM (http://ark.intel.com/products/71459) (powerd works)
  ram: 16 GB DDR3
  hdd: 256 GB SSD
  gfx: Intel HD 4000 (works with Optimus disabled in BIOS)
  gfx: Nvidia Quadro K2000 2 GB (works with Optimus disabled in BIOS)
  sdh: RICOH R5CE823 (SD/SDHC card reader works)
  wif: Intel Centrino Ultimate-N 6300 (works)

===============================================================================



Optimus OFF in BIOS:

  http://i.imgur.com/KAMqhGJ.jpg
  http://i.imgur.com/hhMCqbJ.jpg

===============================================================================
